[color=#000000][Author][/color]
 Qingfeng Wudao

[color=#2000F0]This is only a MOD that modifies game data, without additional game content.[/color] 

[color=#F03000]Shortcut keys:[/color]
 End, LCtrl+LShift, PageUp, PageDown

[color=#000000]Reminder:
[color=#F030F0]If you find you cannot open the editor through hot key, then the most possible reason is you didnt activate the mod.
Press the '?'button on the interface to check the help info. [/color]

As the modifier has many functions, the initial use may be confusing, which is normal.
If you really don't know how to use it, you can watch the video explanation on station B: [color=#F0F0F0]https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Hi4y137Sd/[/color]
In addition, I can be sure that : This mod is definitely the most powerful modifier in the game's history, not one of them! ([If you follow the calculation method of other modifiers, the modifier can modify items far more than 500.])
This mod has everything, small enough to facilitate the function of the game: change the appearance of the character, change the number of days in the game, change the game speed; It is big enough to change character attributes, item attributes, map attributes, and even [color=#F000F0] move the map to another archive. {Need support from Map Assistant}[/color]
Finally, if you really think this mod is useful, don’t forget to like it. . . 
[color=#00F0F0] I promise: 'MOD version modifier' will always be free and open source! [/color]
If you have any BUG or good suggestions, you can leave a message or add group feedback. 
[color=#F0F0F0] Group number: 1040526791[/color]

Current function:
1. Quick character data modification (character quality can be modified, quick character data can be reset (all removed), and spells can be viewed Specific attributes). 
2. Logo modification (of course, the premise is that you can use it). 
3. Time modification (days, hours, seasons in the game). 
4. Map modification (including removing items (any physical items <including Npc, items, buildings, dust, plants, etc>), removing dust). Add and modify the map item belonging to the player (acting on the battle map). 
5. Miscellaneous modifications (quick construction, no day and night alternation, quick work, go to map fog, etc). 
6. Multiple summoning (boss can be summoned). 
7. Recruiting talents (theory can recruit all animals, call enemies, call passers-by, call reincarnation (support demon repair)). 
8. Add weather (you can add any current weather). 
9. Event addition (theory can add any event)
10. Map unlock (unlock specific locations, support all other MODs)
11. Full modification of character attributes (including hundreds of basic attributes, Taoism, Scourge, Foundation building) , Enlightenment, Five Dimensions, etc), support spiritual cultivation and physical cultivation. 
12. Character modifier, character characteristics, experience all add/remove, character mood modification. 
13. Animal enlightenment, thought, thought fragment modification. 
14. Body repair parts, entries, postures, tempering methods are all revised. 
15. You can add/remove character cheats at will, and you can directly change character skills. 
16. Item attribute modification (quantity, grade, name, description, aesthetics, quality...) can be modified. Item management can also change the attributes of magic treasures, towns, and secret treasures
17. One-click hatching/fertilization. 
18. School management (prestige, righteous, evil, name-changeable suffix, sect relationship, maximum number of sects)
19. Add items (all items), including exercises, cheats, puppets, spells, magic treasures, secret treasures, Clothing, etc. 
20. You can view the information of Jianghu NPC (like and hate items), and modify the attributes of Jianghu NPC. 
21. Quick modification of characters (full demand, execution, recovery, rebirth, rescue, removal of characters, one-click transformation, etc). 
22. Achievement unlocking (all achievements can be unlocked with one key, reverse unlocking is not supported). 
23. Area management (in map management, change terrain, fill plants, buildings, modify aura, etc.). 
24. Building management (including building unlocking and building attribute modification) and plant management (plant attribute modification). 
25. Added some quick operations in the NPC management of the rivers and lakes (open heart defense, full relationship, visit martial arts, etc). 
26. New simple to use (no longer afraid to find something to modify). 
27. One-click psychic shaping of objects, buildings, and plants. 
28. You can modify the martial art influence value and related attributes
29.etc
 Accompanying MOD: Map Assistant. Provides copy and transfer of map buildings, plants, terrain, and common items. 
Companion MOD: Miscellaneous assistant. Mainly provide search function.


Other MOD: more events. Provide more attacks and visits. 
Other MOD: One-click cleanup. Provide some quick cleanup functions, clean dead bodies, clean weeds, etc. 
This MOD is currently adding features...
